title: Huawei SFP+ dedicated stack cable, 1.5m
description: Huawei SFP+STACK-CU0M5 is dedicated stack copper cable with length of 1,5m equipped with SFP+ connectors, which is used for device stacking. Stacking using stack cables removes the need of configurations Bend radius of the cable is 25mm GPSR
